description: CompositionBlack capris made of 92% polyester and 8% elastane, with broad ribbed waist band and four colour panelsFitRegularWash CareGentle machine wash with similar colours in lukewarm water Use mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry at low temperatureWarm iron Do not dry cleanWash and iron inside outLook cool this summer in these black capris from puma. The polyester fabric keeps you dry through an active day or through a rigorous training session, while the stretchable feature helps customise the Fit. Team this with tees and sports shoes for a great sporty look. Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, "Height-5'6”, Waist - 32”, Hips – 35”
